backend.label: Local Inference Sandbox
backend.truth: Single-photo preview, hybrid multi-view reconstruction, and asset generation are available locally.

preview.label: Instant Preview
preview.summary: Generate a single-photo Gaussian preview for nearby camera moves.
preview.truth: This is a synthesized preview, not a faithful multi-view reconstruction.

reconstruction.label: Production Reconstruction
reconstruction.summary: Collect a multi-view capture set and fuse SHARP gaussians into a reconstruction scene.
reconstruction.truth: This backend runs a real local hybrid reconstruction: SHARP per-view gaussians fused with OpenCV pose alignment.
reconstruction.input_strategy: 8-32 overlapping photos or short orbit video

asset.label: Single-Image Asset
asset.summary: Generate a hero prop mesh from one reference image.
asset.truth: This lane is object-focused generation, not environment reconstruction.

guidance: Walk an arc around the subject or environment instead of standing in one spot.
Avoid motion blur, mirrors, and moving people crossing the frame.
Capture a full orbit or forward path with height variation before starting reconstruction.
